title: stelis decipula
intro: Stelis decipula, also known as the Decoys Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis decipula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and traditional medicine practitioners.
